home.subtitle:
Computational Fluid Dynamics & AI for Physics
Research student at the intersection of fluid mechanics, deep learning emulation, and climate systems.

introduction.title: Scientific Identity
introduction.text: Trained in theoretical and numerical fluid dynamics, I am currently engineering two-point correlation equation models for turbulence closures (RANS) using channel flow DNS datasets at ONERA. With a strong track record in academic research, international mobility and self-taught machine learning, I aim to solve complex physics problems using rigorous computation and next-generation AI.

experience.title: Academic Trajectory
experience.description: My academic journey and research appointments.

nus.title: College of Design and Engineering — National University of Singapore (NUS)
nus.text: M.Eng in Mechanical Engineering by Research. Supervised by Prof. Gianmarco Mengaldo. Physics-driven emulation for extreme climate events.

onera.title: ONERA, The French Aerospace Lab
onera.text: Research Intern on two-point turbulence equation closures (RANS) using DNS datasets.

lmps.title: Laboratory of Mechanics Paris-Saclay (LMPS) — University of Paris-Saclay
lmps.text: ERC DREAM-ON project. Data assimilation via Kalman filtering & physics-augmented neural networks.

fiuba.title: Laboratory of Fluid Dynamics — University of Buenos Aires (UBA)
fiuba.text: Experimental microfluidics, Marangoni flows, and thermal capillary networks.

ensta.title: M.Sc. in Engineering — ENSTA Paris
ensta.text: Focus on Dynamical Systems, Compressible Fluids, Turbulence, and CFD. Top 5% ranking.

parc.title: French "Classe preparatoire" - Mathematics, physics, computer science
parc.text: Intensive theoretical preparation, ranked 17 nationwide at the entrance examination.

portfolio.title: Core Research Pillars
portfolio.description: Focused research across computational fluid mechanics, AI emulation, and climate scale systems.

aierolab.title: AIerolab
aierolab.description: Simulating the flow around an airfoil using Physics-Informed Machine Learning (PINNs), and evaluating surrogate models for rapid aerodynamic characterization.
aierolab.challenges: Developing a neural network for physics, rigorously conducting numerical experiments

ipt.title: International Physicists' Tournament
ipt.description: Physics experiments and theoretical analysis to characterize the coiling and droplet dynamics of honey.
ipt.challenges: Autonomously conducting experimental methodology and theoretical formulation

lbm.title: LBM Simulations for RANS Verification
lbm.description: Lattice-Boltzmann Method (LBM) solver developed to explore influence parameters and validate standard experimental benchmarks.
lbm.challenges: Constructing computationally stable LBM solvers for complex boundary conditions

hickathon.title: Hackathon: Water Prediction Systems
hickathon.description: Machine Learning pipeline to predict regional water shortages combining massive environmental datasets with XGBoost and temporal networks.
hickathon.challenges: Data assimilation on complex spatio-temporal grids

onera_sim.title: ONERA Turbulence Closures
onera_sim.text: RANS Models using Channel Flow DNS
onera_sim.description: Engineering two-point correlation equation models for turbulence closures (RANS) directly utilizing top-tier channel flow DNS datasets.
onera_sim.challenges: Managing petabyte-scale simulation databases and deriving statistically robust closure terms.

erc_dreamon.title: DREAM-ON ERC - Structure digital twin
erc_dreamon.description: Real-time structural health monitoring with Kalman filtering to build a high-fidelity digital twin ; Machine Learning-based material modeling
erc_dreamon.challenges: Collaborating on a project intertwining three PhD students work, extend the code to treat experimental data, integrate the Neural Network in the loop
